Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

SELECT

MD5(ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM),

md5(OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER_BK+VALID_FROM)

from

 

(

SELECT DISTINCT GUID ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK, OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER_BK FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT

 

GUID,

 

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER_BK

 

FROM (

 

SELECT

 

GUID,

 

REPLACE(OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER, '\n', ',') AS OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER_REPLACED

 

FROM (

 

SELECT DISTINCT GUID, OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

 

FROM T_ATLAN_EXPORT_PHYSICAL_ASSETS

 

 

WHERE OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER IS NOT NULL

 

)

 

) AS BASE,

 

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER_REPLACED, ',') AS SPLIT

 

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

 

ORDER BY GUID, OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER_BK

)

 

)


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERS


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER cascade;

--=======================================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER
--=======================================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER (
DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSH primary key (DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY, DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER set comment = 'Table having list of OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER Keys of physical asset ';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER.DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY is
'Dimension Key';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_GOVERNANCE_MANAGER.DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY is
'dimensional Key adding unique identifier';
